title: dupatya widgreniana
intro: Dupatya widgreniana, also known as False Ashwagandha or Wild Ashwagandha, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The health benefits of Dupatya widgreniana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Dupatya widgreniana include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
